from typing import List, Set

def get_unique_tags(posts: List[dict]) -> Set[str]:
    tags: Set[str] = set()
    for post in posts:
        for tag in post.get("tags", []):
            tags.add(tag)
    return tags

def find_common_categories(items_a: List[dict], items_b: List[dict]) -> Set[str]:
    cats_a = {item["category"] for item in items_a}
    cats_b = {item["category"] for item in items_b}
    return cats_a & cats_b

def get_all_permissions(users: List[dict]) -> Set[str]:
    perms: Set[str] = set()
    for user in users:
        perms.update(user.get("permissions", []))
    return perms

def collect_unique_emails(orders: List[dict]) -> Set[str]:
    return {order["customer_email"] for order in orders}
